title: Gantt Dashboard collapsed view timeline visibility

posts.author: stuartsjg (Stuart Graham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am trying to persuade another dept within the company to move away from MS project and use monday. Their main issue is wanting to condense tasks into an overall timeline.

I can show them this in dashboards and collapse the groups to aligns with their high level headings, however the colour bars are barely visible.

Finally, i am trying to see how i arrange the headings in an order, is it fixed alphabetical, or can the groups be rearranged by some way?

image1561×295 26.1 KB

If i can win others over then we may go from standard-25 to pro-50

posts.author: beck_rowaichi (Beck Rowaichi)
posts.cookedHtml: I too need to choose the group ordering on a dashboard Gantt. How is this achieved please?

posts.author: Akauffmann (Allison)
posts.cookedHtml: You can rearrange the groups in the Main Table view, then they show up in order on the gantt view.
